caption:
Check out this vibrant Ramadan night market in a scenic location! 

📍Ramadan Market in Al Barsha Pond Park
🎟 No entrance fee 

What to expect:
• An array of food stalls; from Arabic sweets to Asian delicacies!
• Retail bazaar selling trendy clothes and Ramadan pieces
• Activities like boat rides, bike rentals, arts and crafts. 

Tag your family and friends!
